subject: Implement ENSP protein node export
description: Use OpenTargets target data to build/stage nodes/protein.parquet with ENSP primary IDs and gene/UniProt xrefs, then validate scratch before GCS promotion.
result: Implemented ENSP protein node export from OpenTargets target.transcripts.translationId. Promoted nodes/protein.parquet with 233,995 ENSP protein nodes and UniProt/gene xrefs. GCS validate PASS: 10 node types, 24 edge types, 3,467,844 nodes, 25,325,918 edges, total_dangling_edges=0, peak RSS about 6.5G.
